title: My First Post on Dev.to
author: Thiru Sakthi
summary:
Hi, I’m Thiru, a Frontend Developer.

I’m passionate about writing clean, well-structured code and setting up proper scaffolds. But I’ve realized that perfection can kill consistency and focus.

That’s why I’m starting this challenge: to document what I do every day, technically—big or small. This is for my own reference and to help newcomers who are learning.

I’ll be sharing my progress daily, lessons learned, and any interesting insights along the way.
full_text:
Hi, I’m Thiru, a Frontend Developer.

I’m passionate about writing clean, well-structured code and setting up proper scaffolds. But I’ve realized that perfection can kill consistency and focus.

That’s why I’m starting this challenge: to document what I do every day, technically—big or small. This is for my own reference and to help newcomers who are learning.

I’ll be sharing my progress daily, lessons learned, and any interesting insights along the way.
